page_metadata.biotools__summary: Predict binding of peptides to MHC class II molecules. The predictions are available for all three human MHC class II isotypes, HLA-DR, HLA-DP and HLA-DQ, as well as mouse molecules.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Predict binding of peptides to MHC class II molecules. The predictions are available for all three human MHC class II isotypes, HLA-DR, HLA-DP and HLA-DQ, as well as mouse molecules.
